overview.title: Overview
paragraphs: PostgreSQL integration uses the Filebeat PostgreSQL module to automatically collect and parse PostgreSQL database server logs. Through structured log data, it helps you quickly locate database issues, monitor connection status, and analyze query performance.

items.title: Multi-line Parsing
items.description: Intelligently handle multi-line SQL statements and error stacks

items.title: Query Time Analysis
items.description: Extract duration field to analyze slow queries and performance bottlenecks

items.title: Connection Tracking
items.description: Record client connection source, user, database information

fieldTables.title: Parsed Fields
fieldTables.description: PostgreSQL server logs will be parsed into the following structured fields:
